topic: My trash cans are emptied mid-week though pickup is Friday, and the bags reappear inside.
title: Something Empties My Trash on the Wrong Day | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My trash cans were always emptied on Wednesday, though pickup came on Friday.
scenes.image_prompt: Two empty trash bins at the curb on an empty suburban street at dawn, fog, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I had taken out the bins on the same street for years.
scenes.image_prompt: A row of curbside trash bins along a quiet residential street, twilight, long shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I filled them slowly, one bag every few days.
scenes.image_prompt: A single black trash bag inside an open bin beside a garage, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One Wednesday I found them rolled out and completely empty.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty trash bin tipped open at the curb, lid raised, gray morning fog, vertical 9:16 framing
An empty quiet street with no vehicles at dawn, faint mist, streetlight haze, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By that evening every bag I had thrown out was back inside.
scenes.image_prompt: Full black trash bags stacked neatly inside an open bin at dusk, dim light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I tied a thread across the lid that night.
scenes.image_prompt: A thin thread stretched across a closed trash bin lid, faint porch light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The thread was unbroken, yet the bin sat empty again.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty open trash bin with an intact thread on its lid, gray dawn fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The returned bags began holding things I never owned.
scenes.image_prompt: An open trash bag revealing unfamiliar folded papers and cloth, dim garage light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One bag held photographs of my house, taken from inside my bedroom.
scenes.image_prompt: Scattered photographs of a house interior spilling from a torn bag, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I stopped putting anything out at all.
scenes.image_prompt: Two clean empty bins standing closed beside a dark garage, twilight, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning a full bag sat by my bed, tied the way I tie them.
scenes.image_prompt: A tied black trash bag resting on a bedroom floor beside a bed, dim dawn light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
